appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.description: Theme + mode are stored locally on this device. The preview below applies instantly across the whole dashboard and every installed app's panel.
appearance.languageDescription: Language is saved to your account and follows you across browsers.
appearance.autoModeHint: Auto follows your operating system's preference and updates live when it changes.
appearance.themeTerminalDescription: Monospace, sharp corners, a workshop look. The default.
appearance.themeCleanDescription: Inter, rounded corners, subtle shadows. Boardroom-ready.
